summary: Comprehensive testing of Market Flux application completed. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend UI loads correctly with all market data, navigation, and core features working. Minor UI overlay issue affecting chatbot accessibility identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts pointer events, preventing chatbot button clicks
ui_bugs.details: The chatbot button is present and visible but cannot be clicked due to overlay interception

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: Market Overview (9 indices loaded)
✅ Backend API: Market Movers (5 gainers, 5 losers)
✅ Backend API: News Feed (171 articles total, 20 per page)
✅ Backend API: Sentiment Mood (bullish: 5, bearish: 10, neutral: 30)
✅ Backend API: User Registration with JWT tokens
✅ Backend API: AI Chat (2708 char responses)
✅ Backend API: AI Usage limits
✅ Backend API: AI Stock Screener (8 results)
✅ Backend API: Stock Detail (AAPL data)
✅ Backend API: News Search functionality
✅ Frontend: Dashboard page loads with all market data
✅ Frontend: Market indices ticker display
✅ Frontend: Top gainers/losers sections populated
✅ Frontend: Latest headlines with sentiment badges
✅ Frontend: Market mood pie chart visualization
✅ Frontend: Sidebar navigation between pages
✅ Frontend: News Feed page with articles
✅ Frontend: AI Screener page loading
✅ Frontend: Portfolio login required flow
✅ Frontend: Auth page with login/register tabs
✅ Frontend: Stock detail navigation from dashboard
✅ Frontend: Responsive design and dark theme
✅ Integration: API data properly displayed in UI

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core features working, 1 minor UI issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot button overlay issue: The emergent badge element is intercepting pointer events on the chatbot toggle button. Either adjust z-index layering or modify the badge positioning to allow chatbot access.
